name: code-research
description: 源码理解研究工作流：架构、机制、数据流、演进历史、阅读路径、Day 0 视角和质量地图

interface.shortDescription: Deep codebase research and reading paths
interface.longDescription: Research an existing codebase from architecture, mechanisms, data flow, evolution history, source reading paths, Day 0 product and technical design, and maintainability risks.
defaultPrompt: Research this codebase and summarize the architecture
Build a source reading path for this project
Analyze Day 0 product and technical design
